title: Multiplied Drops
description: Forge 1.20.1 mod that multiplies block and mob drops with configurable multipliers. Supports vanilla, Randomizer mods, and JujutsuCraft with anti-lag protections.
body: Multiplied Drops is a Forge 1.20.1 mod that multiplies both block and mob drops with fully configurable multipliers. The mod supports vanilla and modded items, including compatibility with Randomizer-style mods and anime mods such as JujutsuCraft. Stackable and non-stackable items can be configured separately, with randomized partial stack generation for more natural drops. The mod also includes anti-recursive duplication protection and anti-lag systems for improved stability during chaotic gameplay. Version 2 has it's own built in config menu.
